name: Onion “caviar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped sweet onions, cooked black-eyed peas, diced pimento, diced green bell pepper, chopped green onion, chopped fresh garlic, Italian dressing, salt, and pepper.
2. Stir all ingredients until well mixed and allow the mixture to marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Serve as an appetizer or side dish.
